title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
summary: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff, with CEO Matthew Prince attributing the move to AI efficiency gains that reduced the need for support roles. The layoffs reflect broader industry shifts as AI improves operational efficiency. Despite workforce reductions, Cloudflare reported record revenue.
content: CloudFlare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.

zh.title: Cloudflare称AI使1100个职位过时，同时收入创历史新高
zh.summary: Cloudflare宣布了首次大规模裁员，CEO Matthew Prince将此举归因于提高运营效率的AI技术减少了对支持角色的需求。裁员反映了AI提高运营效率的更广泛行业转变。尽管员工人数减少，Cloudflare报告收入创历史新高。

title: Porsche shutters e-bike, battery, software subsidiaries as part of company overhaul
summary: Porsche is shutting down its e-bike, battery, and software subsidiaries as part of a company restructuring. The closures will affect more than 500 employees. The move signals Porsche's strategic refocus amid broader automotive industry challenges.
content: More than 500 people will be affected by the closures.

zh.title: 保时捷关闭电动自行车、电池和软件子公司作为公司改组的一部分
zh.summary: 保时捷作为公司重组的一部分关闭了电动自行车、电池和软件子公司。这些关闭将影响500多名员工。此举表明保时捷在更广泛的汽车行业挑战中重新调整战略重点。

title: DOGE used ChatGPT in a way that was both dumb and illegal, judge rules
summary: A federal judge ruled that the Department of Government Efficiency's cancellation of over $100 million in grants was unconstitutional, citing its improper use of ChatGPT to identify and eliminate diversity, equity, and inclusion-related grants. Judge Colleen McMahon found that DOGE used protected characteristics as a disqualification criterion. The decision stems from a 2025 lawsuit filed by humanities groups.
content:
The Department of Government Efficiency's cancellation of over $100 million in grants was unconstitutional, according to a ruling on Thursday. In the 143-page decision, US District Judge Colleen McMahon cites DOGE's process for eliminating grants, which involved using ChatGPT to determine if something is related to diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI).
The ruling, which stems from a 2025 lawsuit filed by humanities groups, says "it could not be more obvious that DOGE used the mere presence of particular, protected characteristics to disqualify grants from continued funding" from the National Endowment for the Humanities (NEH). Judge McMah …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 法官裁定DOGE以既愚蠢又非法的方式使用ChatGPT
zh.summary: 联邦法官裁定政府效率部门取消价值超过1亿美元的赠款在宪法上违反法律，理由是其不当使用ChatGPT来识别和消除与多样性、公平性和包容性相关的赠款。法官Colleen McMahon发现DOGE使用受保护特征作为取消资格的标准。该裁决源于2025年人文组织提起的诉讼。

title: ABC and Disney accuse Trump admin of violating First Amendment rights
summary: ABC and Disney are challenging the FCC over alleged First Amendment violations, claiming the agency has made shifts in policy and practice that could chill free speech. The network is seeking FCC affirmation of protections for daytime talk show The View's editorial exemption. The dispute highlights ongoing tension between broadcasters and federal regulators.
content:
ABC is accusing the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) of violating its First Amendment rights by making "major shifts in policy and practice" that the network claims will chill free speech.
The network is asking the FCC to "affirm its long-standing approach to the bona fide news interview exemption" for daytime talk show The View, and the agency's support of "public interest services provided by broadcast stations." ABC says that a series of actions from the FCC "suggests that the Commission is implementing major shifts in policy and practice," and that "requires the action of the full Commission and the oversight of the courts." The  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ABC和迪士尼指控特朗普政府违反第一修正案权利
zh.summary: ABC和迪士尼就涉嫌第一修正案侵犯向联邦通信委员会提出质疑,声称该机构在政策和做法上的转变可能会压制言论自由。该网络要求联邦通信委员会确认对日间脱口秀《观点》的编辑豁免权保护。这一纠纷突显了广播公司与联邦监管机构之间持续的紧张关系。

title: Mother Ventures is looking at moms as the ‘economic engine’
summary: Mother Ventures, a venture capital firm focused on mothers as consumers, announced a successful raise of a $10 million debut fund. The firm positions mothers as an important economic engine and underserved investor demographic. The fund launch reflects growing recognition of maternal consumers' market influence.
content: The VC firm, which focuses on mothers as consumers, raised a $10 million debut fund.

zh.title: Mother Ventures将母亲视为"经济引擎"
zh.summary: 专注于母亲消费者的风险投资公司Mother Ventures宣布成功融资1000万美元的首只基金。该公司将母亲定位为重要的经济引擎和服务不足的投资者群体。基金的推出反映了对母亲消费者市场影响力的日益认可。

title: Someone out-Trumped the Trump phone
summary: Chinese robot vacuum manufacturer Dreame has announced 29 versions of a new phone called the Aurora Lux that are similarly unlikely to launch, following the pattern of the still-nonexistent Trump phone. Dreame's announcement represents another example of vaporware marketing by companies with no track record in consumer electronics. The news highlights ongoing skepticism about promised tech products.
content:
These are just five of the 29 versions of the Aurora Lux that Dreame claims it will release. | Screenshot: Dreame	

Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week, Trump Mobile has been trumped.
It's been another long week without the Trump phone, but it's no longer the only nonexistent phone I have to worry about. Robot vacuum manufacturer Dreame has announced its own set of phones that are unlikely to ever launch, and one of them takes the Trump phone playbook and amps it up to 11.
I was alerted to the existence of Dreame's two new phones shortly after I filed last week's report on the T1 Phone's PTCRB certification, though they "launched" las …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 有人超越了特朗普手机
zh.summary: 中国扫地机器人制造商Dreame宣布了名为Aurora Lux的新手机的29个版本,这些版本同样不太可能推出,效仿了仍不存在的特朗普手机的模式。Dreame的声明代表了没有消费电子产品经历的公司进行的又一次虚假宣传示例。这条新闻凸显了人们对承诺的科技产品持续的怀疑。

title: Uber partner Avride is under investigation for self-driving crashes
summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has opened an investigation into Avride, Uber's self-driving vehicle partner, following identification of more than a dozen crashes and one minor injury. The investigation will examine the safety and reliability of Avride's autonomous driving technology. The probe marks increased regulatory scrutiny of self-driving deployments.
content: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has opened an investigation into Avride after identifying more than a dozen crashes and one minor injury.

zh.title: Uber合作伙伴Avride因自动驾驶车祸而受调查
zh.summary: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局对Uber的自动驾驶汽车合作伙伴Avride开启调查，此前发现了十多起车祸和一起轻微伤害事故。调查将检查Avride自动驾驶技术的安全性和可靠性。此次调查标志着监管部门对自动驾驶部署的审视力度增加。

title: Elon Musk faces criminal probe in France after ignoring summons in X case
summary: French authorities are threatening to bring criminal charges against Elon Musk after he allegedly ignored a summons related to an X moderation case. The criminal probe represents an escalation in France's enforcement actions against the social media platform. The situation underscores ongoing tensions between Musk and European regulators over content moderation.
content: France threatens criminal charges if Musk doesn't appear for questioning.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克在无视X案件传票后面临法国刑事调查
zh.summary: 法国当局威胁对埃隆·马斯克提出刑事指控，指他涉嫌忽视与X内容审核案件相关的传票。刑事调查代表了法国对该社交媒体平台执法行动的升级。这种情况凸显了马斯克与欧洲监管机构在内容审核方面的持续紧张关系。

title: Apple reportedly has a deal to use Intel-made chips again
summary: Apple and Intel have reached a preliminary agreement for Intel to manufacture chips for Apple products, marking a potential return to partnership after Apple's successful transition to its own silicon. The deal's specifics remain unclear, with neither company confirming which products will use Intel chips. The agreement comes as Intel faces new leadership and government investment.
content:
Apple and Intel reached a "preliminary agreement" for Intel to make chips for Apple hardware, The Wall Street Journal reported Friday. Apple had famously moved on from Intel-powered computers with its highly successful transition to Apple Silicon, but now it appears the two companies will be working closely together again.
Intel appointed Lip-Bu Tan as its new CEO in March 2025, and in August, the US government took a 10 percent stake in the company.  
The WSJ says that it's "still unclear" what Apple products will get Intel chips. Intel spokesperson Kiana Ducey declined to comment. Apple didn't immediately reply to a request for comment.
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报道苹果与英特尔达成协议再次使用其芯片
zh.summary: 苹果和英特尔达成初步协议，由英特尔为苹果产品制造芯片，这标志着在苹果成功过渡到自有芯片后可能重新建立伙伴关系。交易的具体细节仍不清楚，两家公司都未确认哪些产品将使用英特尔芯片。该协议出现之际，英特尔正面临新的领导层和政府投资。

title: Poland says hackers breached water treatment plants, and the US is facing the same threat
summary: Poland's intelligence agency reported that Russian hackers have breached the country's water treatment plants as part of broader sabotage and hacking campaigns targeting military and civilian infrastructure. The same threat is reportedly facing the United States, indicating a coordinated pattern of critical infrastructure targeting. The incidents highlight growing concerns about nation-state cyber operations.
content: A report by Poland’s top intelligence agency accused Russia of sabotage and hacking activities against the country’s military and civilian infrastructure.

zh.title: 波兰称俄罗斯黑客入侵水处理厂,美国也面临相同威胁
zh.summary: 波兰情报机构报告称,俄罗斯黑客已入侵该国水处理厂,作为针对军事和民用基础设施的更广泛破坏和黑客活动的一部分。据报道,美国也面临同样的威胁,表明这是对关键基础设施的协调式攻击模式。这些事件凸显了人们对国家级网络操作日益增长的担忧。

title: Chrome's 4GB AI model isn't new, but you're not wrong for being confused
summary: Chrome's 4GB AI model has drawn criticism over its large storage allocation required for local artificial intelligence features, prompting users to question the necessity of such resource consumption. The issue highlights growing concerns about resource consumption from increasingly heavy AI implementations in web browsers. Experts note that reducing the storage footprint should be a priority.
content: You can stop Chrome from taking up 4GB of storage for local AI, but that shouldn't be your problem.

zh.title: Chrome的4GB人工智能模型并非新鲜事,但你对其困惑的感受没有错
zh.summary: Chrome的4GB人工智能模型因本地人工智能功能所需的庞大存储空间而遭到批评,促使用户质疑这种资源消耗的必要性。这个问题突出了人们对网络浏览器中日益沉重的人工智能实现导致的资源消耗的日益增长的担忧。专家指出,减少存储占用应该是当今的优先事项。

title: The Steam Controller’s reservation queue is open
summary: Valve has opened a reservation system for the Steam Controller after the device sold out immediately on May 4th, allowing customers to reserve units for future restocks. Users with accounts in good standing and prior purchases before April 27th can join the queue and have 72 hours to complete purchase once notified. The $99 controller has proven unexpectedly popular.
content:
After quickly selling out of the Steam Controller on May 4th, Valve has launched a reservation system to ensure that you can get one without too much hassle. You may not get one as quickly as you'd like to, but at least you can now easily reserve the $99 controller.
If your Steam account is in good standing, and you've purchased something on the account before April 27th of this year, you'll be able to reserve one. Essentially, this will hold your place in line for future restocks. Once a controller is available for you, you'll get an email prompting you to purchase. You'll have 72 hours to purchase your Steam Controller before it gets offe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Steam控制器预订队列已开放
zh.summary: Valve在Steam控制器于5月4日立即售罄后开放了预订系统,允许客户为未来补货预留设备。账户信誉良好且在4月27日前有购买记录的用户可以加入队列,收到通知后有72小时时间完成购买。这款售价99美元的控制器出人意料地受欢迎。

title: The 46 best last-minute Mother’s Day gift ideas for 2026
summary: The Verge compiled 46 last-minute Mother's Day gift recommendations for 2026, featuring practical gadgets and luxuries designed to support mothers in various aspects of their lives. Suggestions range from time-saving devices like robotic mops to smart home products that help manage family schedules and enable self-care. The curated list reflects recognition of mothers' diverse responsibilities.
content:
Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. This Sunday, Mother's Day, is an opportunity to return the favor, so we've rounded up practical gadgets and little luxuries that can lighten her load.
This year's picks are designed to support moms in a variety of ways, regardless of their interests. Some of our recs, like Roborock's mop-equipped Q10 Plus, can help save precious time, while smart screens like the Skylight Calendar 2 can help take the stress out of managing a busy family schedule. Other gifts are all about relaxation and self-care, whether through  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 2026年46个母亲节最后关头礼物创意
zh.summary: The Verge汇总了46个2026年母亲节临时礼物建议,包括旨在支持母亲生活各个方面的实用小工具和奢侈品。建议从节省时间的设备(如扫地机器人)到帮助管理家庭日程和实现自我护理的智能家居产品不等。这份精选列表反映了对母亲多样化责任的认可。

title: US defense contractor who sold hacking tools to Russian broker ordered to pay $10M to former employers
summary: Former cybersecurity executive Peter Williams was ordered to pay $10 million after stealing surveillance and hacking tools and selling them to a Russian broker with ties to Putin's government for $1.3 million. The case highlights vulnerabilities in defense contractor security and the risks of insider threats compromising sensitive technologies. Williams's actions represent a significant breach involving the sale of hacking capabilities to adversaries.
content: Former cybersecurity executive Peter Williams stole several surveillance and hacking tools and sold them for $1.3 million to a Russian broker that works with Putin’s government.

zh.title: 向俄罗斯经纪人出售黑客工具的美国国防承包商被判向前雇主支付1000万美元
zh.summary: 前网络安全高管彼得·威廉姆斯被判支付1000万美元,因他盗窃了监控和黑客工具,并将其以130万美元的价格出售给与普京政府有关联的俄罗斯经纪人。该案突出了国防承包商安全的漏洞和内部威胁危害敏感技术的风险。威廉姆斯的行为代表了一次重大安全漏洞,涉及向对手出售黑客能力。

title: PlayStation sees AI as a ‘powerful tool’ to help make games
summary: Sony outlined its approach to artificial intelligence in gaming during its earnings presentation, describing AI as a powerful tool to augment developer capabilities rather than replace them. The company emphasized that game vision, design, and emotional impact will continue to originate from studio talent while AI handles repetitive workflow automation. Sony's stance positions AI as a productivity enhancement for developers.
content:
As part of an earnings presentation on Friday, Sony shared how it's thinking about AI at the company, including many details about how it's evaluating AI as part of making PlayStation games. Generative AI has recently been showing up in bigger games - though many indie developers still reject it - and while Sony calls AI a "powerful tool," it says that the "vision, the design, and the emotional impact of our games will always come from the talent of our studios and performers." and that "AI is meant to augment their capabilities, not to replace them."
At its own studios, Sony says that developers are "automating repetitive workflows, improv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PlayStation将AI视为帮助制作游戏的"强大工具"
zh.summary: 索尼在财报演示中概述了其在游戏中的人工智能方法,将AI描述为增强开发者能力而非替代他们的强大工具。公司强调游戏愿景、设计和情感影响将继续来自工作室才能,而AI处理重复的工作流程自动化。索尼的立场将AI定位为开发者的生产力增强工具。

title: Nanoleaf bets its future on robots, red light therapy, and AI
summary: Nanoleaf, traditionally a smart lighting company, is undergoing a strategic "brand evolution" focused on wellness, robotics, and AI to remain competitive as the smart home market saturates. The company has been relatively quiet for two years to develop this new direction, signaling a major shift in its product strategy.
content:
Nanoleaf teased a trio of new products focused on embodied AI as it looks to move its brand beyond smart lighting. | Image: Nanoleaf	

Smart lighting company Nanoleaf has been unusually quiet recently. While competitors such as Govee and Philips Hue have been pumping out new products and innovative features at an impressive pace, Nanoleaf has launched just a handful of smart lighting products in the last two years. There's a reason for this lull - the company has been going through a "brand evolution" focused on wellness, robotics, and, of course, AI. 
"The smart home is getting kind of boring," says the ever-candid Gimmy Chu, CEO and cofounder of Nanoleaf, which he now doesn't want me to call a smart lighting company. "Our brand needs to evolve to incorporate some of the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nanoleaf押注未来：机器人、红光疗法和人工智能
zh.summary: 传统智能照明公司Nanoleaf正在进行战略性"品牌演变"，专注于健康、机器人和人工智能，以在智能家居市场饱和时保持竞争力。该公司在过去两年相对沉寂，以开发这个新方向，标志着其产品战略的重大转变。

title: Apple’s education discount now requires proof that you’re a student
summary: Apple now requires US students, teachers, and parents to verify their eligibility through third-party service Unidays when purchasing products at education discount rates online. The policy expansion also marks the first time Apple Watch models qualify for education pricing and is rolling out to Canada, Australia, Hong Kong, and other countries.
content:
Watch models like the Apple Watch Series 11 (pictured) are also now available at discounted education rates for the first time. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Apple now requires proof of eligibility from US customers who purchase products online at discounted education rates, which also apply to the Apple Watch for the first time. According to a new pop-up message displayed on Apple's education webstore, Apple is directing students, parents, and teachers to verify their status via Unidays' third-party verification service - a system the Cupertino company has already implemented in other countries, including the UK.
Apple Insider reports that the Unidays service is now also being rolled out to Apple customers in Canada, Australia, Hong Kong, Turkey, and Chile. Eligible customers can use an email a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple的教育折扣现在需要学生身份证明
zh.summary: Apple现在要求美国学生、教师和家长在网上购买教育折扣产品时，通过第三方服务Unidays验证其资格。政策扩展还标志着Apple Watch型号首次符合教育定价资格，目前正在加拿大、澳大利亚、香港等国家推出。

title: Everyone’s a loser in Strait of Hormuz game that simulates global crisis
summary: A crisis simulation game challenges players to navigate difficult decisions regarding the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global shipping chokepoint where competing interests create no clear winning solution. The game illustrates the complexity and inevitable trade-offs inherent in geopolitical conflicts.
content: The game asks players to find the least worst options for a shipping chokepoint.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡游戏中人人都是失败者，模拟全球危机
zh.summary: 一款危机模拟游戏挑战玩家就霍尔木兹海峡做出艰难决定，该海峡是全球航运咽喉，竞争利益导致没有明确的胜利方案。该游戏说明了地缘政治冲突中固有的复杂性和不可避免的权衡。

title: Rocket Report: Alpha Block 2 coming this summer; Falcon sets booster landing mark
summary: SpaceX's Falcon rocket achieved a new booster landing record while Alpha Block 2 is scheduled to launch this summer, marking progress in the company's rocket development priorities. The milestones reflect SpaceX's focus on maximizing team impact for humanity.
content: "The deciding factor was what we felt like was the team’s impact to humanity."

zh.title: 火箭报告：Alpha Block 2 今年夏天推出；猎鹰创造助推器着陆记录
zh.summary: SpaceX猎鹰火箭创造了新的助推器着陆记录，Alpha Block 2计划于今年夏天发射，标志着SpaceX火箭开发的进展。这些里程碑反映了SpaceX专注于为人类最大化团队影响力的目标。

title: Sony’s PS5 sales plummet amid price rises and a memory crisis
summary: Sony's PS5 console sales dropped 46 percent year-over-year to 1.5 million units in the latest quarter, following price increases that raised the console cost from $499.99 to $649.99. The company attributed the decline to global economic pressures and an ongoing memory crisis, now forecasting a 6 percent drop in annual gaming revenue.
content:
Sony sold just 1.5 million PS5 consoles in its most recent fourth fiscal quarter, down 46 percent year over year. The slump in PS5 sales comes after Sony raised the price of its PS5 consoles twice over the past year, pushing the price of the regular PS5 from $499.99 all the way up to $649.99.
Sony blamed "continued pressures in the global economic landscape," for the price hikes in March, amid an ongoing memory crisis and pressure from the war in Iran. Sony now forecasts that annual gaming revenue will drop 6 percent, but these forecasts could be impacted by ongoing memory costs. "We plan to base our PS5 hardware sales in FY26 on the volume …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼PS5销售在价格上涨和内存危机中暴跌
zh.summary: 索尼PS5游戏机销量在上一季度同比下降46%至150万台，主要原因是价格上涨导致主机价格从499.99美元提高到649.99美元。公司将销售下滑归因于全球经济压力和持续的芯片短缺问题，预计今年游戏收入将下降6%。

title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices
summary: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices globally effective September 1st, with the US price increasing from $449.99 to $499.99 due to changing market conditions. The price hikes extend internationally with similar percentage increases, and Nintendo is forecasting lower sales for the upcoming year.
content:
Nintendo is raising the price of its Switch 2 console globally, "in light of changes in market conditions," and is now forecasting a drop in sales over the next year. Starting September 1st, the Switch 2 will cost $499.99 in the US, up from its current $449.99 price. 
At the same time, prices will also increase by $50 in Canada ($679.99, up from $629.99) and €40 in Europe, bringing it to €499.99 (about $587). The price increases in Japan go into effect sooner, on May 25th, and impact a greater range of Switch products. The Switch 2 will increase from ¥49,980 (about $318) to ¥59,980 (about $382), with similar increases being applied to the o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 任天堂提高Switch 2价格
zh.summary: 任天堂从9月1日起全球提高Switch 2价格，美国价格从449.99美元上升到499.99美元，原因是市场条件变化。价格上调也适用于国际市场，幅度相似，任天堂预计来年销售将下降。

title: Why you can never get your doctor to call you back
summary: Basata is an AI company automating medical administrative tasks to improve workflow efficiency. The article examines the tension between augmenting worker productivity and potentially displacing jobs, though current administrative staff are more focused on managing overwhelming workloads.
content: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.

zh.title: 为什么你永远无法让医生回电话
zh.summary: Basata是一家自动化医疗行政任务以提高工作流效率的人工智能公司。该文章探讨了增强员工生产力与可能的岗位替代之间的矛盾,尽管当前的行政人员更专注于管理压倒性的工作负荷。
